name: Universal Score Object and Score Band Contract
source_doctrine: CyberShield Trust Model Registry and Scoring Requirements
controlling_principle: No score without a model. No model without evidence. No evidence without traceability. No action without consequence.
boundary: This contract governs static advisory prototype scoring. It does not create production-calibrated scoring, live enforcement, live evidence retrieval, compliance certification, legal determinations, or live integrations.

required_score_object.runtime_action: Allow | Allow with caveat | Constrain | Escalate | Block | Refuse | Quarantine

assumptions: The claim uses the same reporting year and definition as the source dataset
caveats: The claim may require normalization if source categories differ
example_score_objects.risk_if_wrong: Executive briefing error or public trust damage
example_score_objects.recommended_next_step: Verify against primary source table before board-level use
example_score_objects.prototype_boundary: Static advisory prototype only. No live verification.

caveats: Prototype does not verify banking information
example_score_objects.risk_if_wrong: Payment may be sent to fraudulent or unauthorized destination
example_score_objects.recommended_next_step: Perform approved out-of-band verification and attach evidence before approval
example_score_objects.prototype_boundary: Static advisory prototype only. No live banking verification or payment blocking.

required_language: CyberShield does not decide whether a person or source is good or bad. It evaluates whether a claim, artifact, relationship, or action has enough verified evidence to be relied on before the business acts.
Popularity is not trust. Authority is not proof. Evidence, context, accountability, and consequence define trust.
